title: HEALTH CENTER SERVICES - 211info
text: CASCADIA GARLINGTON HEALTH CENTER HEALTH CENTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health counseling for family, primary care, wellness programs, and substance use disorder (SUD) services, including Adult Outpatient/Recovery day services and supportive employment. 3036 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-6pm, Friday 8:30am-5pm Phone intake: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 283-3763 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (503) 283-3763 Intake (503) 674-7777 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 6 Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Family Counseling General Medical Care Group Counseling Individual Counseling Subsidized Employment Wellness Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CASCADIA GARLINGTON HEALTH CENTER
